typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{Project ID} as string,
		{ROC ID} as string,
		{ROCS ID} as string,
		{Project Number} as string,
		{Project Description} as string,
		Code as string,
		Name as string,
		{Sub Prime} as string,
		{ROCS Name} as string,
		{ROCS Step} as string,
		{ROCS Percentage} as string,
		{Driving?} as string,
		Quantity as string,
		{Quantity Description} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'FileName',
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/SitePro/ROC/sitepro_roc.csv']) ~> srcROCSiteproStage
srcROCSiteproStage derive(FileName = concat('Project_Data/NCSA/SitePro/ROC/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/','roc_sitepro_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		{Project ID},
		{ROC ID},
		{ROCS ID},
		{Project Number},
		{Project Description},
		Code,
		Name,
		{Sub Prime},
		{ROCS Name},
		{ROCS Step},
		{ROCS Percentage},
		{Driving?},
		Quantity,
		{Quantity Description},
		FileName
	)) ~> snkROCSiteproRaw
